markdown.headingText: 期刊論文 (Journal Publications)
markdown.markdown: ::: {.callout-note icon=false} #### 機器學習於銷售預算之應用：一項方法論比較與教學案例 陳心蘋、吳元利、**張修瑋 \*** *會計審計論叢* ` Accepted (2026/04/15) | Forthcoming` ::: ::: {.callout-note icon=false} #### Does public endorsement by a celebrity CEO affect supply chain partners? **Chang, H.-W.**, J.-L. Ho, and Y.-S. Lin. *Journal of Accounting, Auditing & Finance* (2025). [🔗 DOI: 10.1177/0148558x251323381](https://doi.org/10.1177/0148558x251323381){target="_blank"} ::: ::: {.callout-note icon=false} #### 銷售交易之營業稅與營利事業所得稅查核實務與案例解析 陳心蘋、吳元利、**張修瑋 \*** *月旦財稅實務釋評* 63 (2025): 27-37. ::: --- ## 工作論文 (Working Papers) ::: {.callout-warning icon=false} #### The Moderating Role of Corporate Governance under Tariff Shocks **Chang, H.-W.**, J.-L. Ho, Y.-S. Lin, and M.-L. Wang. *Journal of Contemporary Accounting & Economics* — 第二審 (Under Review) ::: ::: {.callout-warning icon=false} #### Pricing the Blame: How Event Attribution Shapes Audit Fees in Corporate Groups 余建緯、**張修瑋 \*** *會計審計論叢* — 第一審 (Under Review) ` 2025 台灣會計學會年會 Best Academic Paper Award` ::: ::: {.callout-warning icon=false} #### 供應鏈危機下會計資訊品質之調節角色 吳元利、**張修瑋 \***、王泰昌 *中華會計學刊* — 第二審 (Under Review) ` 2025 台灣會計學會年會 Best Academic Paper Award` ::: --- ## 研討會發表 (Conference Presentations) | 年份 | 研討會 | 論文 | |------|--------|------| | 2025 | Taiwan Accounting Association, Taipei | 名人執行長公開背書對供應鏈夥伴的影響 | | 2025 | Taiwan Accounting Association, Taipei | Pricing the Blame | | 2023 | Taiwan Accounting Association, Taipei | Navigating Supply Chain Crises | | 2022 | Taiwan Accounting Association, Tainan | The Moderating Role of Accounting Quality | | 2022 | AAA/Deloitte Doctoral Consortium, Texas | The Moderating Role of Accounting Quality |
